identity.name: İBB Casa Botter
identity.address: Şahkulu, İstiklal Cd. No:235, 34421 Beyoğlu/İstanbul, Türkiye

discovery.text: Verified for İstiklal Caddesi: Casa Botter is directly on the avenue and is one of the clearest pieces of restored architectural texture on the street — an art nouveau frontage now functioning as a public cultural stop instead of dead heritage scenery.

narrative.summary: A restored art nouveau building on İstiklal that helps explain the avenue's layered frontage and current cultural reuse.

blocks.title: Why it teaches the street
blocks.body: İstiklal is great because spectacle and everyday passage happen against a dense wall of historic buildings. Casa Botter makes that visible: a finely detailed façade, directly on the pedestrian stream, now reactivated as a cultural address rather than sealed-off ornament.
